seed_text: In the woods we return to reason and faith. Standing on the bare ground — my head bathed by the blithe air
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing: here's a feeling of nothing on the breeze, a soft green skin, a place where thoughts are still sticky with honey.
